entries.title: observatory: fix repo identifier in health call
entries.summary: Patch release. The 1.90.0 observatory pipeline passed the cloned repo's absolute filesystem path to `get_repo_health(repo=...)`, which then tried to parse it as `owner/name` and tripped the path- separator guard in `sqlite_store._safe_repo_component`. Every repo
